basics.name: Joseph Demarest
basics.label: Multidisciplinary Engineer (Software and Electrical)
basics.summary: I'm a multidisciplinary engineer with expertise in software development, electrical engineering, and systems integration. Passionate about designing innovative solutions, creating robust systems, and solving challenging technical problems.

work.name: Vyir Inc
work.summary: Led the development of hardware and software systems for R&D applications.
highlights: Developed a low-cost, multiplatform beam profiler with advanced device controls, data collection and analysis capabilities.
Created user-friendly PyQtGraph GUI applications for various experimental test bench setups.
Designed systems to be versatile; supporting Linux, Windows, and ARM.
Engineered various in-house PCBs for use in prototypes, test benches, and data analysis.

work.name: College of Staten Island
work.summary: Supported an introductory computer science course by assisting students and developing course materials.
highlights: Graded assignments and exams for a class of 200 students.
Provided one-on-one support during office hours and via discussion forums.

work.name: College of Staten Island
work.summary: Enhanced student understanding of computer science principles and programming languages through personalized tutoring.
highlights: Tailored lessons to address individual learning needs.
Focused on core programming languages and concepts for academic success.

education.summary: Participant in Computer Science Club, Coding Bootcamps, and Hackathons.

personalProjects.name: Home Lab
personalProjects.summary: Set up a robust home lab environment for experimentation and self-hosting.
highlights: Built and managed servers hosting various applications, including my personal website and game servers.
Utilized Docker and Kubernetes for containerized and secure application deployment.
Explored advanced networking configurations and automation tools.

personalProjects.name: Custom Electronics Projects
personalProjects.summary: Worked on various electronics projects, including IoT devices and custom PCBs.
highlights: Designed a custom full-size keyboard PCB, optimized for both functionality and aesthetics.
Developed a plant monitoring system using IoT devices and custom hardware for real-time environmental tracking.

workProjects.name: Beam Profiler
workProjects.summary: Developed a low-cost, multiplatform beam profiler with advanced data collection and analysis capabilities.
highlights: Designed a versatile system supporting Linux and Windows (ARM64 and x86).
Integrated advanced camera APIs for real-time image capture and processing.
Implemented thermal control using Thermoelectric Cooler (TEC) devices for precise laser temperature profiling.
Created a user-friendly PyQtGraph GUI featuring live image processing, ROI selection, and statistical analysis.
Optimized performance with multithreading, enabling smooth concurrent operations.
Developed features for data saving, cloud synchronization, and metadata tagging for robust traceability.

workProjects.name: Custom Driver Board
workProjects.summary: Engineered a driver board for controlling and monitoring multiple devices in experimental setups.
highlights: Designed and fabricated a custom PCB to interface with a wide range of devices.
Developed a GUI for live monitoring and control, allowing users to adjust device parameters in real-time.
Implemented a modular architecture for compatibility with diverse hardware configurations.
Streamlined prototype-to-experiment workflows for enhanced research efficiency.

workProjects.name: Measurement System GUI
workProjects.summary: Developed a GUI to control multiple precision instruments for laser measurements.
highlights: Integrated motorized rotators, linear sliders, and temperature controllers into a cohesive interface.
Designed intuitive controls for configuring experiment parameters and monitoring real-time data.
Implemented multithreaded operation to ensure responsive and error-free performance during complex tasks.
